entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLEAR AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY AND BREEZY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
BREEZY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
